title: Senate Planetary Intelligence Network
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Organization |image= |name=Senate Planetary
Intelligence Network |type= |founder=[[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]]{{SW|url=news/the-star-wars-spy-game-spin-declassified|text=The ''Star Wars'' Spy Game: SPIN Declassified|int=The Star Wars Spy Game: SPIN Declassified|nolive=1}} |leader=[[New Republic Provisional Council]] |subgroup= |headquarters=*[[Palace of the Woolamander]] *[[Defense Research and Planetary Assistance Center]] |locations=*[[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] *[[Dagobah/Legends|Dagobah]] *[[Dac/Legends|Dac]] *Other Alliance worlds |formed=[[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|Alliance Intelligence]] |founded=[[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] |fragmented= |reorganized= |dissolved=[[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]] {{C|into the [[New Republic Intelligence Service]]}} |restored= |affiliation=*[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] **[[New Republic Senate/Legends|New Republic Senate]] }} The '''Senate Planetary Intelligence Network''', also known as the '''Senate Interplanetary Intelligence Network''', or '''SPIN''', was a intelligence service for the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and was tasked with providing the [[New Republic Senate/Legends|New Republic Senate]] intelligence and analysis. It was founded in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] by [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]] and was headquartered in the [[Palace of the Woolamander]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]], and was under the direct control of the [[New Republic Provisional Council]]. However, the agency proved largely ineffective, though SPIN was able to conduct some operations against [[Trioculus]], Mothma together with [[General/Legends|General]] [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]] worked to form the [[New Republic Intelligence Service]] (NRI) to correct SPIN's failings. By the time the New Republic [[Liberation of Coruscant (Galactic Civil War)|captured]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], SPIN served little more than an outpost function. It was disbanded and its resources turned over to the NRI. ==History== After the defeat of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Galactic Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] at the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]], reorganized as the [[Alliance of Free Planets]], began preparations to become as the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and take [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and established their legitimacy. The Empire began a [[HoloNet/Legends|HoloNet]] propaganda campaign under the [[Prophets of the Dark Side|Prophet of the Dark Side]] [[Cronal|Lord Cronal]], going so far as to claim [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] as a [[Heroes of Yavin/Legends|hero]] of the Empire. To counter the Imperial propaganda fears of autocratic leadership, [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]] had [[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|Alliance Intelligence]] reorganize as the Senate Planetary Intelligence Network, or SPIN. Though a true "Senate" did not yet exist at that time, leadership of the new intelligence agency was given to the [[New Republic Provisional Council]] which included Mon Mothma and [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar]]. The heavy handed [[Alliance Special Operations/Legends|Alliance Special Operations]] units where phased out though [[General/Legends|Generals]] [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]] and [[Crix Madine/Legends|Crix Madine]] continued various SpecOp missions which they reported to the SPIN leadership and council admiral [[Hiram Drayson/Legends|Hiram Drayson]]. SPIN was headquartered on the New Republic's temporary [[Capital/Legends|capital]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] in the refurbished [[Palace of the Woolamander]] where the Provisional Council met. They also built the [[Defense Research and Planetary Assistance Center]] (DRPAC) at [[Mount Yoda]] on the planet [[Dagobah/Legends|Dagobah]]. Both locations however had major security flaws that would later cause serious issues. Although said to be an analysis and infiltration network utilizing stellar [[Agent/Legends|agents]] such as [[Kea Moll]], [[Mirith Sinn]], and [[Kyle Katarn]], SPIN also formed the [[Rapid Response Team (SPIN)|Rapid Response Team]] to deal with covert missions. Composed of Luke Skywalker, [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]], [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]], and [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], the team had a major flaw in that all the operatives were extremely well-known. SPIN's existence would be defined by the short rule of [[Trioculus]] as [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] and his search for the [[Lost City of the Jedi]]. When Trioculus [[Plan Number Two|bombarded]] Yavin 4 in search of the Lost City, SPIN relocated to DRPAC on Dagobah. Even at DRPAC though the agency was confounded by security flaws and intelligence leaks. It was these issues and the ineffectiveness of SPIN that brought about Mothma's formation, unknown to her fellow councilors, of a second, ultra-secret intelligence network known as [[Alpha Blue]], formed from Airen Cracken's "Shadow Operations". Additionally, Mothma began working behind the scenes with General Cracken in forming the [[New Republic Intelligence Service]] (NRI). SPIN had become largely powerless by the end of the [[Milagro campaign]],''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' and by the time the New Republic [[Liberation of Coruscant (Galactic Civil War)|captured]] Coruscant, it had become little more than an outpost guarding the secrets of the Lost City of the Jedi. The organization was disbanded and its resources turned over to the NRI. SPIN's short existence was generally viewed as a complete intelligence failure or at the very least a very naïve attempt. However the agency did provide a useful testbed for the formation of the NRI and did, in its own way, conduct an effective campaign against Emperor Trioculus that kept him off balance and thereby giving other New Republic forces more freedom to act. ==Appearances== *''[[The Glove of Darth Vader]]'' {{1st}} *''[[The Lost City of the Jedi]]'' *''[[Zorba the Hutt's Revenge]]'' {{Mo}} *''[[Mission from Mount Yoda]]'' *''[[Queen of the Empire]]'' {{Mo}} *[[Prophets of the Dark Side (novel)|''Prophets of the Dark Side'']] ==Sources== *''[[The Essential Guide to Characters]]'' *[[The Essential Chronology (real-world book)|''The Essential Chronology'']] *''[[Power of the Jedi Sourcebook]]'' *{{LucasArts|url=products/outcast/html/spin.html|text=N.R.I. Reports|int=N.R.I. Reports}} {{Mo}} *''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *{{DB|character|landocalrissian|Calrissian, Lando}} *{{SW|url=news/the-star-wars-spy-game-spin-declassified|text=The ''Star Wars'' Spy Game: SPIN Declassified|int=The Star Wars Spy Game: SPIN Declassified|nolive=1}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |es=Red de Inteligencia Interplanetaria del Senado }} [[Category:New Republic intelligence organizations]] [[Category:New Republic Senate organizations]]
